member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.AccountSyncOptions
member.summary: Per-account sync configuration.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.AccountSyncOptions.AccountId
member.summary: Unique account identifier.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.AccountSyncOptions.MaxConcurrency
member.summary: Maximum number of concurrent upload/download operations. Defaults to when null.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.AccountSyncOptions.SelectedFolders
member.summary: Folder paths (relative, forward-slash separated) to include in sync. All files within these folders and their descendants are synced (SE-07).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.ISyncEngine
member.summary: Orchestrates bi-directional file sync for a single account (SE-01).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.ISyncEngine.SyncAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Runs a full sync cycle for the given account: detects changes, applies concurrency limits (SE-02), and transfers files in both directions (SE-01).
member.returns: A result containing the sync report on success, or an error message on failure.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.ISyncLock
member.summary: Per-account concurrency gate ensuring only one sync runs at a time (SE-08).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.ISyncLock.TryAcquire(System.String)
member.summary: Attempts to acquire the sync lock for the given account. Returns true if the lock was acquired; false if a sync is already running.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.ISyncLock.Release(System.String)
member.summary: Releases the sync lock for the given account.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.ISyncLock.IsRunning(System.String)
member.summary: Returns whether a sync is currently running for the given account.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.ISyncProvider
member.summary: Abstracts remote file-storage operations so the sync engine is decoupled from any specific cloud provider.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.ISyncProvider.GetChangesAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the set of items that differ between local and remote for the given account, filtered to the selected folders (SE-07).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.ISyncProvider.UploadAsync(System.String,AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncItem,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Uploads a local file to the remote provider.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.ISyncProvider.DownloadAsync(System.String,AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncItem,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Downloads a remote file to the local file system.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.ISyncScheduler
member.summary: Manages automatic sync scheduling with per-account staggering (SE-04, SE-05).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.ISyncScheduler.StartAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts automatic sync scheduling for the given accounts. Schedules are staggered evenly across the sync interval (SE-05).
member.param: Cancellation token that stops all scheduled syncs.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.ISyncScheduler.StopAsync
member.summary: Stops all scheduled syncs.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.ISyncScheduler.IsRunning
member.summary: Returns whether the scheduler is currently running.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncDirection
member.summary: Indicates the direction of a file transfer during sync.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncDirection.LocalToRemote
member.summary: Upload a local file to the remote provider.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncDirection.RemoteToLocal
member.summary: Download a remote file to the local file system.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncEngine
member.summary: Default sync engine implementation that orchestrates bi-directional sync (SE-01) with configurable concurrency (SE-02) and per-account locking (SE-08).
Default sync engine implementation that orchestrates bi-directional sync (SE-01) with configurable concurrency (SE-02) and per-account locking (SE-08).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncGate
member.summary: Thread-safe per-account sync lock (SE-08).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncItem
member.summary: Represents a single file that needs to be synchronised.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncItem.RelativePath
member.summary: Relative path of the file within the sync root (forward-slash separated).

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncItem.Direction
member.summary: The direction this item should be synced.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncItem.LocalModifiedUtc
member.summary: Last-modified timestamp of the local copy, if it exists.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncItem.RemoteModifiedUtc
member.summary: Last-modified timestamp of the remote copy, if it exists.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncItem.LocalSizeBytes
member.summary: Size of the local file in bytes, if it exists.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncItem.RemoteSizeBytes
member.summary: Size of the remote file in bytes, if it exists.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncItemResult
member.summary: The outcome of syncing a single .

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncItemResult.Item
member.summary: The item that was synced.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncItemResult.Succeeded
member.summary: Whether the transfer succeeded.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncItemResult.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Error message if the transfer failed; null on success.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncOptions
member.summary: Global sync engine configuration.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncOptions.DefaultMaxConcurrency
member.summary: Default maximum concurrent upload/download operations per account.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncOptions.DefaultSyncInterval
member.summary: Default automatic sync interval.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncOptions.MaxConcurrency
member.summary: Maximum number of concurrent upload/download operations per account (SE-02). Individual accounts may override this via .

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncOptions.SyncInterval
member.summary: Interval between automatic sync runs (SE-04). With N accounts, each account's schedule is staggered by Interval / N (SE-05).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncReport
member.summary: Summary of a completed sync run for a single account.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncReport.AccountId
member.summary: The account that was synced.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncReport.StartedAtUtc
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the sync started.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncReport.CompletedAtUtc
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the sync completed.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncReport.ItemResults
member.summary: Individual results for each item that was processed.

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncReport.Uploaded
member.summary: Number of items that were uploaded (local to remote).

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncReport.Downloaded
member.summary: Number of items that were downloaded (remote to local).

member.name: P:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncReport.Failed
member.summary: Number of items that failed to sync.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncScheduler
member.summary: Manages automatic sync scheduling with per-account staggering (SE-04, SE-05).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncScheduler.#ctor(AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.ISyncEngine,AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.ISyncLock,AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncOptions,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncScheduler})
member.summary: Manages automatic sync scheduling with per-account staggering (SE-04, SE-05).
